framework: Next.js 14 App Router with Tailwind CSS 3
palette: Legacy demo used Tailwind defaults and raw hex values. The landing uses root semantic OKLCH tokens.
motion: Motion-cut approach with CSS transitions only; no motion library is installed.
spacing: Existing Tailwind spacing is preserved. The landing adds a semantic 4px-based scale.
preserve: Local Geist and Geist Mono font files
Existing GuideLoop and OnboardingChecklist public APIs
Existing legacy demo components as unreferenced examples
